'''Ooloos D'Lrint''' was a [[Astrography|Astrographer]] and member of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Astrographic Survey Institute]].

Astrographer D'Lrint compiled the Institute's report on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sacorria]].

{{Char-stub}}
